candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and valid top-line measure.
Not revenue; operating expense.

candidates.row_label: Profit from Sales of Trading Assets
candidates.why: Non-operating gain, not core revenue.
Direct sales/top-line measure; often preferred when it equals total revenue.
Explicitly non-revenue.

variables.notes: Use Net sales as primary top-line; Total Revenue as fallback since both appear and are identical in shown years.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales style line; large direct operating cost directly below revenue.
Component of materials/services in some years, not full COGS when parent line exists.
Balancing row, should not be used.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost bucket rather than subcomponent or balancing rows.

candidates.why: Could be overhead component in some years, but appears to be a subcomponent of Materials and services (COGS area) in 2022-2021.
Operating overhead/personnel-type expense and populated across years.
Broad operating overhead bucket populated across years.
Classic SG&A component, but appears as a subcomponent within Other operating expenses in some years.
Classic SG&A component, but appears as a subcomponent within Other operating expenses in some years.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but preview is empty; may be used in some periods.
SG&A-like label, but preview empty and likely overlaps with Employee benefits xpense.
SG&A-like label, but preview empty and likely overlaps with Employee benefits xpense.
Could be included in SG&A only if separate and above EBIT; here appears as a supplemental row below EBIT area.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview, so per rule include it plus closest populated overhead buckets. Excluded Sales and marketing expenses and Administration expenses to avoid likely double counting because they appear nested within Other operating expenses in some years. Excluded External Services because it sits within the COGS section under Materials and services.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related but specifically amortization, not full R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D label; best semantic match despite empty preview.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated amortization Development cost in Progress
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Chose the dedicated R&D line. Did not add it to XSGA_COMPONENTS because the visible R&D-related presentation appears in supplemental disclosure below operating profit, so including it in SG&A could misplace the expense.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; acceptable fallback if no specific interest expense is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial loans recognized at amortized cost
candidates.why: Most specific reported interest expense line.
Too broad and not specifically interest.
Net of financial income, less preferred than pure expense lines.
Explicit interest expense label; semantically good if populated in some periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific interest component, but supplemental and partial rather than total interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial loans recognized at amortized cost

variables.notes: Priority ordered from most specific interest expense to broader finance expense fallback. Excluded net finance and other financial expense lines as less appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the Parent company Comprehensive profit (loss) for the period attributable
candidates.why: Income statement profit line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Result for the finacial year Total equity attributable to Equity holders of the
candidates.why: Appears to be a malformed/concatenated equity-related line item, but not the clean best choice when a clearer total equity attributable line exists.
Usable equity total, but less preferred because parent-only equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to Equity holders of the Parent company
candidates.why: Best parent/owner equity line, excludes minority interest conceptually.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to Equity holders of the Parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with minority interest. Included Total equity only as fallback if labeling changes.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the balance sheet minority interest stock.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests line.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated balance sheet minority interest line. BE uses parent-attributable equity, so this avoids double counting.
